ddls:
CREATE TABLE "work_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work activity entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee performing the work activity */,
  "non_working_days" INTEGER /* Number of non-working days */,
  "working_days_non_working_hours" INTEGER /* Number of non-working hours on working days */,
  "working_days_working_hours" INTEGER /* Number of working hours on working days */,
  "activity_logon" INTEGER /* Number of activity logons */,
  "url_count" INTEGER /* Number of URLs accessed */,
  "http_request_count" INTEGER /* Number of HTTP requests made */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the work activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the work activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the work activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the work activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the work activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_activity_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Laptop, Smartphone) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who uses the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the device was purchased */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logons" (
  "logon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logon event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work activity */,
  "logon_count" INTEGER /* Number of logons for the activity */,
  "logon_date" TEXT /* Date of the logon event */,
  "logon_time" TEXT /* Time of the logon event */,
  "logon_location" TEXT /* Location from which the logon occurred */,
  "logon_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for the logon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logons_logon_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("logon_device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logons_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES work_activity ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls_accessed" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL access */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work activity */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the URL was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the URL was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the URL access */,
  "http_status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_accessed_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES work_activity ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "http_requests" (
  "http_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HTTP request */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work activity */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Number of HTTP requests made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the requests were made */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time the requests were made */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* Full URL of the request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the request */,
  "response_status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("http_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_http_requests_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES work_activity ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device usage event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the device was used */,
  "usage_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the device usage */,
  "usage_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the device usage */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the device usage */,
  "usage_location" TEXT /* Location where the device was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES work_activity ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work activity */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_detected_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who detected the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_anomalies_anomaly_detected_by FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_detected_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_anomalies_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES work_activity ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "assignment_valid_until" TEXT /* Date until which the role assignment is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
